response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify talk segments and musical performances. 2. Identified Song 1 as 'LET'S JUST CRASH' and searched for lyrics using composer name 'syudou'. 3. Identified Song 2 as 'Blue World' and searched for lyrics using composer name '目黒将司' (Shoji Meguro). 4. Mapped all scenes to timestamps and structured into JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two musical performances by Mori Calliope, Shido, and Nerissa Ravencroft. The video begins with an introduction followed by a performance of 'LET'S JUST CRASH' by Mori Calliope and Shido, a brief transition, and then a performance of 'Blue World' by Nerissa Ravencroft and Mori Calliope.

scenes.description: The performers introduce themselves and the first song, 'LET'S JUST CRASH'.
Performance of 'LET'S JUST CRASH' by Mori Calliope and Shido. Text 'Music, Arrangement: syudou' appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro]
Ha-ha-ha-ha
Hey, you got eyes and ears, but you don't look or listen
In other words, you're useless, every last one of ya
And that's why I'm gonna send you all to hell
All of humanity, hell

[Verse 1]
声援背負い颯爽と登場
そういうんじゃねぇ
I'm just the type you'd forget
So don't waste your time
千切れ腐りかけの chain, going insane, somebody's gotta pay
While I live with the pain, laugh at me now, I'm the one you can't tame, huh
低俗で最低の天才
そういうんでいい

[Pre-Chorus]
想いが募る
場所に花は咲くから (Let's riot)

[Chorus]
(Get back, you're trash)
掃き溜めで希望を (Let's just crash)
積み上げていくんだ
頂から高らかに笑え (Lose control)
美しき理想を (Heads will roll)
汚してくる野郎は
誰だ一体？誰だ一体？
誰だったとしても
この理想は無理だろって
誰が言ったとしても叶えてこうぜ

[Verse 2]
正解不正解の解答
どうだっていい
そんなとっくのとうに
超えた場所に俺は立っている
Yeah, meaningless problems, everybody's got 'em
And they can't be satisfied until somebody's at the bottom, so what?
You think you're special 'cause you got some grit and hunger?
We ain't getting any younger, thinking let's just crash

[Pre-Chorus]
心が通う
時に魂が叫ぶ (Hoo-hoo)

[Interlude]
(Get back, you're trash)
ドブネズミの様に (Let's just crash)
気高く生きるんだ
俺が通る今すぐに退け (Let's riot)

[Chorus]
(Get back, you're trash)
掃き溜めで希望を (Let's just crash)
積み上げていくんだ
頂から高らかに笑え (Lose control)
美しき理想を (Heads will roll)
汚してくる野郎は
誰だ一体？誰だ一体？
誰だったとしても
この理想は無理だろって
誰が言ったとしても叶えてこうぜ

[Post-Chorus]
Oh-oh, woah-oh
叶えてこうぜ

[Outro]
(Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Intro]
Ha-ha-ha-ha
Hey, you got eyes and ears, but you don't look or listen
In other words, you're useless, every last one of ya
And that's why I'm gonna send you all to hell
All of humanity, hell

[Verse 1]
Seien seoi sassou to toujou
Sou iu njannee
I'm just the type you'd forget
So don't waste your time
Chigire kusarikake no chain, going insane, somebody's gotta pay
While I live with the pain, laugh at me now, I'm the one you can't tame, huh
Teizoku de saitei no tensai
Sou iu nde ii

[Pre-Chorus]
Omoi ga tsunoru
Basho ni hana wa saku kara (Let's riot)

[Chorus]
(Get back, you're trash)
Hakidame de kibou wo (Let's just crash)
Tsumiagete ikunda
Choujou kara takaraka ni warae (Lose control)
Utsukushiki risou wo (Heads will roll)
Yogoshite kuru yarou wa
Dare da ittai? Dare da ittai?
Dare datta to shitemo
Kono risou wa muri daro tte
Dare ga itta to shitemo kanaete kouze

[Verse 2]
Seikai fuseikai no kaitou
Dou datte ii
Sonna tokku no tou ni
Koeta basho ni ore wa tatteiru
Yeah, meaningless problems, everybody's got 'em
And they can't be satisfied until somebody's at the bottom, so what?
You think you're special 'cause you got some grit and hunger?
We ain't getting any younger, thinking let's just crash

[Pre-Chorus]
Kokoro ga kayou
Toki ni tamashii ga sakebu (Hoo-hoo)

[Interlude]
(Get back, you're trash)
Dobunezumi no you ni (Let's just crash)
Kidakaku ikiru nda
Ore ga touru ima sugu ni退け (Let's riot)

[Chorus]
(Get back, you're trash)
Hakidame de kibou wo (Let's just crash)
Tsumiagete ikunda
Choujou kara takaraka ni warae (Lose control)
Utsukushiki risou wo (Heads will roll)
Yogoshite kuru yarou wa
Dare da ittai? Dare da ittai?
Dare datta to shitemo
Kono risou wa muri daro tte
Dare ga itta to shitemo kanaete kouze

[Post-Chorus]
Oh-oh, woah-oh
Kanaete kouze

[Outro]
(Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha)

scenes.description: A short talk and transition period.
Performance of 'Blue World' by Nerissa Ravencroft and Mori Calliope. Text 'Music, Arrangement: 目黒将司' appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Verse 1]
Walking an empty road, nowhere for me to go
Lost and lonely, yeah, it’s only me
Burnt out like candlelight, left blazing through the night
Melting slowly until nothing else is left of me

[Chorus]
Colored in shades of grey
Watching the days pass in front of me
Longing to find a way
I can fly away, I’m drifting through this blue, blue world

[Verse 2]
It’s always been clear to me, how cruel the world can be
My shadow’s the only one beside me
No love to call my own, no notifs on my phone
Sunken silence has engulfed the very life I lead

[Chorus]
Colored in shades of grey
Watching the years pass in front of me
Memories I wish would stay
Always fade away, I’m lonely in this blue, blue world

[Bridge]
Though my heart is torn
And my weary wings are worn
Just tonight, can’t I dream of a better life
With happiness in sight?

[Chorus]
Colored in shades of grey
Watching my life pass in front of me
Maybe it’s not too late
If I can’t escape, I’ll have to make my own way
Colored in shades of grey
Palette in hand, I can make a change
I’ll try to find the strength
Take a breath and paint, bring color to this blue, blue world

Lost and lonely, yeah, it’s only me
Burnt out like candlelight, left blazing through the night

Colored in shades of grey

I’ll try to find the strength
Take a breath and paint, bring color to this blue, blue world
